notes: First frozen regime — the four-component tuple stamp (plan §5.2). seed_controlled=false (sim/capabilities.json) so the regime is unseeded; reproducibility posture is distribution-stable + audit-trail (NFR-3). A change to ANY component, or a new simulator/env version, requires a NEW file regime-v002 — never an edit of this one (plan §5.3). Never compare results across regimes (NFR-5).
